operating_rule: Do not repeat an alert unchanged; classify root cause, safe next action and approval boundary.

patterns.next_safe_action: inspect the exact profile cron output and create a scoped fix/approval packet; do not generalize to Docker failure.
patterns.object: LK Shopify Sales OS nightly full reconcile read-only
patterns.why_it_causes_errors: Agents may report governance healthy while a specialist cron is failing.

patterns.next_safe_action: compare helper inventory, expected profile map and runtime env injection; report presence/status only.
patterns.why_it_causes_errors: Agents may claim an integration is absent when the issue is naming/runtime injection/map drift.

patterns.next_safe_action: split oversized instructions into references, repair missing refs, and prefer source lookup before acting.
patterns.why_it_causes_errors: Oversized/stale/broken-reference skills increase hallucinated or outdated operating instructions.
